Event: Royal Challenge - Season 27
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A134
Ominous Blush

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Every second, the unit restores health equal to 5% of their max health to themself and all allies.

Once in a while, a healing spark travels across the battlefield. It restores 80000 health to all allies for each ally on the battlefield with 50% or less health. Also, the spark deals 80000 magic damage to all enemies for each ally on the battlefield with 50% or more health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
